subject: GIV s/n 1108
body:
Jeffrey,
I received a phone call from Charlie who is handling  the sale of this 
Gulfstream 4.
He said some one spoke to you on this  aircraft, here are the specs.
1989 
total time 5700 with only 3200 landings,,,the major 72  month was completed 
last year...the maintenance numbers and interior floor  plan look interesting.
Ask is 19M  but he said there is a lot of room  and would take much lower.
lv

From: "Dottie Lindsay" <dottie@americanaircraftsales.com>
Subject: GIV s/n 1108
Date: Tue, 25 Mar 2008 15:27:12 GMT
To: lvjet@aol.com

Dear Larry,

At Charlie Tolbert's request, attached are specs, photos & CMP on this Gulfstream IV.

Charlie would appreciate receiving same on your GIIB s/n 151.  Thanks.  You can just email back to me.

Regards,
Dottie Lindsay
Sales & Internet Administrator
American Aircraft Sales International, Inc.
Venice FL
941-484-0699
www.AmericanAircraftSales.com
